RURIMEGU-TRUE_FACE_PIXEL_POWER.title: True Face Pixel
RURIMEGU-TRUE_FACE_PIXEL_POWER.descripti: This turn, your next [gold]Burst[/gold] card deals damage equal to [gold]Burst[/gold] count to ALL enemies.
RURIMEGU-TRUE_FACE_PIXEL_POWER.smartDesc: This turn, your next [gold]Burst[/gold] card deals damage equal to [gold]Burst[/gold] count to ALL enemies.

RURIMEGU-SPECIAL_APPEAL_POWER.title: Special Appeal
RURIMEGU-SPECIAL_APPEAL_POWER.descriptio: Whenever you [gold]Collect[/gold] ❤️, deal damage to ALL enemies.
RURIMEGU-SPECIAL_APPEAL_POWER.smartDescr: Whenever you [gold]Collect[/gold] ❤️, deal damage to ALL enemies.
RURIMEGU-UNADORNED_BEAUTY_POWER.title: Unadorned Beauty
RURIMEGU-UNADORNED_BEAUTY_POWER.descript: At the start of your turn, gain energy. You can no longer increase your ❤️ limit.
RURIMEGU-UNADORNED_BEAUTY_POWER.smartDes: At the start of your turn, gain {Amount:energyIcons()}. You can no longer increase your ❤️ limit.

RURIMEGU-HOLIDAY_HOLIDAY_POWER.descripti: Whenever you trigger a [gold]Backstage[/gold] effect, it triggers an additional time.
RURIMEGU-HOLIDAY_HOLIDAY_POWER.smartDesc: Whenever you trigger a [gold]Backstage[/gold] effect, it triggers {Amount} additional time(s).
RURIMEGU-WELCOME_ISHIKAWA_POWER.title: Welcome! Ishikawa
RURIMEGU-WELCOME_ISHIKAWA_POWER.descript: At the start of your turn, choose [gold]Backstage[/gold] card(s) from your draw pile to put into your hand.
RURIMEGU-WELCOME_ISHIKAWA_POWER.smartDes: At the start of your turn, choose {Amount} [gold]Backstage[/gold] card(s) from your draw pile to put into your hand.
RURIMEGU-WELCOME_ISHIKAWA_POWER.selectio: Choose up to {Amount} [gold]Backstage[/gold] card(s) from your draw pile to put into your hand.
RURIMEGU-TRAINING_CAMP_POWER.title: Training Camp
RURIMEGU-TRAINING_CAMP_POWER.description: The first several [gold]Backstage[/gold] card(s) you play each turn cost 1 less.
RURIMEGU-A_THOUSAND_CHANGES_POWER.title: A Thousand Changes
RURIMEGU-A_THOUSAND_CHANGES_POWER.descri: This turn, your ❤️ overflow is converted to Max ❤️.
RURIMEGU-A_THOUSAND_CHANGES_POWER.smartD: This turn, your ❤️ overflow is converted to Max ❤️.
RURIMEGU-ENDURING_TRADITION_POWER.title: Enduring Tradition
RURIMEGU-ENDURING_TRADITION_POWER.descri: Until the end of turn, whenever your Max ❤️ increases, trigger [gold]Auto Burst[/gold] that many times and [gold]Collect[/gold] instead.
RURIMEGU-ENDURING_TRADITION_POWER.smartD: Until the end of turn, whenever your Max ❤️ increases, trigger [gold]Auto Burst[/gold] that many times and [gold]Collect[/gold] instead.
RURIMEGU-CAREER_SURVEY_POWER.title: Career Survey
RURIMEGU-CAREER_SURVEY_POWER.description: Whenever you [gold]Burst[/gold] at least 8 ❤️ in a single instance without reaching your limit, draw cards.
RURIMEGU-CAREER_SURVEY_POWER.smartDescri: Whenever you [gold]Burst[/gold] at least 8 ❤️ in a single instance without reaching your limit, draw {Amount} card(s).
RURIMEGU-CAREER_SURVEY_UPGRADED_POWER.de: Whenever you [gold]Burst[/gold] at least 6 ❤️ in a single instance without reaching your limit, draw cards.
RURIMEGU-CAREER_SURVEY_UPGRADED_POWER.sm: Whenever you [gold]Burst[/gold] at least 6 ❤️ in a single instance without reaching your limit, draw {Amount} card(s).
